creator: exploringlondon
caption:
This is London’s BOOK STREET! 📚 With over 20 independent shops here, specialising rare, second-hand and antique books (as well as rare stamps, coins, notes and more). Happy world book day everyone 🌍

📍 This is Cecil Court
Share it with a book lover in your life!

#bookstreetlondon

transcription.text: Did you know that there's a book street in London known as Booksellers Row? It really feels like you've gone back in time here, featuring Victorian lamps and over 20 independent shops specialising in rare, second-hand and antique books. The shopfronts haven't changed in more than a century and it's even thought to be the inspiration behind Harry Potter's Diagon Alley. This is Cecil Court, perfect for that book lover in your life. Make sure you save this for your next London trip.
